def positive_jinja2_environment_created_with_autoescape_disabled():
    rule_id = "jinja2_environment_created_with_autoescape_disabled"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Jinja2 Environment created without autoescape=True or with autoescape=False, enabling XSS."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
